question: According to the chart data, between which two consecutive years did the river water level increase by the largest amount?
explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2015-2018: 30 cm → 223 cm (change 193 cm); 2021-2024: 237 cm → 38 cm (change 199 cm).
